---
permalink: /robots.txt
sitemap: false
layout: null
---
{%- assign site_url = site.url | default: site.github.url -%}
# {{ site.title }} — {{ site.tagline }}
# This site welcomes AI agents and crawlers. Agent-readiness config
# lives under `agent_readiness:` in _config.yml.
# Generated by Jekyll from robots.txt — do not edit the built copy.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
{%- if site.agent_readiness.content_signal %}
Content-Signal: {{ site.agent_readiness.content_signal }}
{%- endif %}

{%- for bot in site.agent_readiness.ai_bots_allow %}

User-agent: {{ bot }}
Allow: /
{%- if site.agent_readiness.content_signal %}
Content-Signal: {{ site.agent_readiness.content_signal }}
{%- endif %}
{%- endfor %}

{%- for bot in site.agent_readiness.ai_bots_disallow %}

User-agent: {{ bot }}
Disallow: /
{%- endfor %}

Sitemap: {{ '/sitemap.xml' | absolute_url }}
